context: Defines validation rules for AODS corpus integrity. AODS v3 adds surface-pair, layer, capsule, touch-route, artifact-semantic, and experimental bidirectional-sync checks on top of schema, referential integrity, completeness, and AOP compliance.
assumptions: Validator has access to all files in corpus
JSON Schema draft-07 validation is available

sections.content: L1 MUST: manifest.json exists and validates against manifest.schema.json. Every modules[].path resolves inside corpus root. Every module file validates against module.schema.json. module_id matches manifest entry. No duplicate module IDs. No duplicate sid within module. boot_sequence and boot_by_role contain valid module IDs. boot_by_touch.match stays relative and corpus-contained. surface_pairs records match schema and keep human paths corpus-contained.

L2 MUST: deps[] resolve to manifest.modules[].id. section.refs[] resolve. section.artifact_refs[] resolve. role.required_modules[] resolve. meta.capsule.routes_to resolve. boot_by_touch.load_modules[] resolve. surface_pairs.agent_primary and agent_supporting resolve. human_primary and human_supporting paths exist inside corpus root. Artifact-internal references also resolve: process-flow next targets, subprocess_ref, payload_schema, decision-tree node targets, topology endpoints, group node IDs, and mapping-table row width against declared columns. Circular module deps forbidden; circular section refs allowed with warning.

sections.topic: surface pair layer and capsule checks
sections.content: L3 SHOULD: every human-facing primary surface has paired agent_primary when corpus declares surface_pairs. boot_sequence starts with layer=root modules; capsule modules may follow root modules; detail and evidence should not lead boot. category=capsule <-> layer=capsule. category=capsule -> meta.capsule.{read_when, core_question, routes_to} present. sync_source=bidirectional warns until merge protocol exists. boot_by_touch should stay specific enough to narrow authoring loads instead of recreating full boot_by_role lists. Hook layer rejects paired human-surface edits when sync_source=agent-primary and no paired agent module changed in the same change set; manifest-only metadata edits do not satisfy semantic sync. shared_invariants, when declared on a surface_pair, must remain present in both agent_primary and human_primary texts. tokens_approx populated for all modules. Stable or frozen modules contain no TODO: or UNDEFINED: markers.

L4 SHOULD: no markdown syntax in content fields. No filler phrases. No conversational tone. No positional refs. Regex-based checks should ignore quoted anti-pattern examples when spec modules cite forbidden strings literally. Token density score > 3.5. No section content exceeds 2000 tokens. Capsule summaries stay shorter than detail modules they route to.

Validator outputs JSON: {corpus:str, timestamp:iso8601, levels:{L1,L2,L3,L4}, summary:{total_modules:int, total_sections:int, total_artifacts:int, total_tokens:int, total_surface_pairs:int, errors:int, warnings:int}}. issue = {level:str, module_id:str|null, sid:str|null, rule:str, message:str}.

artifacts.usage: Lookup table for validation level semantics.

rows: missing manifest; invalid module schema; invalid surface_pairs shape
broken refs; broken routes_to; missing human path; invalid process-flow targets; invalid topology endpoints; mapping-table row mismatch
capsule missing meta.capsule; boot order starts with detail; missing tokens_approx
markdown in content; filler prose; oversized section

artifacts.usage: Surface-pair, layer, and capsule validation rules.

rules.action: L1 error: human_primary must stay inside corpus root
L1 error: boot_by_touch match must stay inside corpus root
L2 error: declared shared_invariants missing from paired surfaces
L3 warning: boot should start with root layer
L3 warning: evidence should not participate in initial boot
L3 warning: bidirectional sync remains experimental until merge protocol exists

changelog.delta: Added surface-pair, layer, capsule, and boot-order validation rules plus total_surface_pairs in validation output.
Clarified capsule layer/category identity and added explicit bidirectional-sync warning semantics.
Hardened corpus-contained path rules and clarified that manifest-only edits do not satisfy agent-primary hook sync.
Added shared_invariants surface-pair validation so declared semantic anchors become built-in detectable drift failures.
